headings.usage: Hero titles, section headers, prominent numbers. Must use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, button text, chat messages. Clean and legible.

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Subtle grain overlay using SVG or CSS to break digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.grid_lines: Subtle 1px border lines to separate stats/bento items (The Tactical Look).
visual_enhancers.pulse_animation: Animate a drop-shadow or background opacity for 'Live' badges.

layouts.hero: Mobile-first full screen or min-h-[80vh]. Heavy dark gradient mask (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/90 to-transparent) over the background image. Content should be bottom-heavy to feel grounded.
layouts.bento_grid: Mobile-first grid-cols-1 or grid-cols-2. Asymmetric row-spans for a dynamic look. Flat backgrounds with 1px borders. Use inner glows instead of heavy drop shadows.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6 to p-8 for cards. gap-4 to gap-6 for bento grid to ensure breathing room.

motion.hover: Scale buttons up by 1.05. Interactive cards get a slightly lighter bg or a glowing border.
motion.entrance: Framer motion staggered fade-in-up for grid items. Adds premium feel.

icons.style: Clean, sharp. Use brand primary color (#CCFF00) for active/highlighted icons.

images.description: Vibrant nighttime soccer match in an illuminated stadium
images.category: Hero Background (Needs heavy dark gradient overlay)

images.description: Excited fans cheer during a soccer match

components_strategy.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-xl. Primary button MUST be the Electric Lime (#CCFF00) with dark text (#0A0A0A) for extreme contrast and high visibility.
components_strategy.cards: Cardless or sharp 12px radius. Flat #121212 background with 1px border-white/5. Hover effect adds border-[#CCFF00]/30.
components_strategy.navigation: Floating bottom nav or sticky top nav using 'Crystal Glass' effect (bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10).
components_strategy.badges: Live badges for 'Live Scores' or 'Active Voice Rooms'. Red (#FF3B30) or Lime (#CCFF00) with pulse animation.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient text-shadow. #CCFF00 on #0A0A0A passes AAA.
accessibility.rtl: Use Tailwind logical properties (e.g., ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, text-start, border-s, rounded-e) exclusively.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a mobile-first PWA landing page in Arabic for 'Koora Voice'. Target file: /app/frontend/src/pages/HomePage.js
RTL MANDATORY: Use `dir='rtl'` structure or logical CSS properties (e.g., `ms-4` instead of `ml-4`, `pe-2` instead of `pr-2`, `text-start`). Do not use generic centering for text.
Import Google Fonts 'Cairo' and 'Almarai' in the index.css. Apply them globally or specifically to headings and body.
Use framer-motion for high-energy entrance animations. Stagger the bento grid items.

Hero Section: Use the provided stadium image as an absolute background with a heavy overlay of `bg-black/60` and a gradient to `bg-[#0A0A0A]` at the bottom so it blends seamlessly into the next section.
Features: Build a 'Bento Grid' for Voice Rooms (غرف صوتية), Live Chat (دردشة حية), Live Scores (نتائج مباشرة), Community (مجتمع رياضي).

Feature Cards: Adopt 'The Tactical Look'. Dark background, 1px subtle white/5 border. Include a Lucide icon and title. Make the 'Live Scores' card span 2 columns and show a mockup of a live match score (e.g., ريال مدريد 2 - 1 برشلونة).
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Keep the vibe 'Electric & Neon' (Archetype 7 mixed with Archetype 2: The Performance Pro). Sporty, aggressive, passionate.
Do NOT use 'transparent' background for nav or floating elements. Use the specified 'glassmorphism' classes.
Implement a 'Pulse' animation on the 'Live' indicators (e.g., a glowing red dot for live matches).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Avoid generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
